category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an F1 Live Timing TUI; official GitHub README documents live timing, race-control, driver-tracker, strategy, replay, and related Formula 1 session features.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses UndercutF1 as the project name while documenting the undercutf1 executable.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes table of contents, getting started, configuration, logging, API, and replay sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/JustAman62/undercut-f1, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe a terminal UI for Formula 1 live timing, replay, configuration, and session data.
